info.title: Chive API
info.description: AT Protocol AppView for scholarly eprints

Get related papers for an eprint based on citation patterns, semantic similarity, and topic overlap. Supports graph-based analysis including co-citation and bibliographic coupling.

parameters.name: includeTypes
parameters.description: Types of relationships to include. 'co-citation' and 'bibliographic-coupling' use graph analysis. 'collaborative' uses collaborative filtering.

get.description: Update an eprint submission with a new version

pub.chive.annotation.comment.boundingRec.description: Bounding rectangle coordinates for highlight positioning. All values stored as strings to preserve floating-point precision since ATProto only supports integer type.

x1.description: Left edge coordinate (as string to preserve float precision)

y1.description: Top edge coordinate (as string to preserve float precision)

x2.description: Right edge coordinate (as string to preserve float precision)

y2.description: Bottom edge coordinate (as string to preserve float precision)

width.description: Page width reference (as string to preserve float precision)

height.description: Page height reference (as string to preserve float precision)

value.description: Fragment identifier (e.g., page number, section ID)

eprintUri.description: AT-URI of the eprint containing the linked text

confidence.description: Confidence score for the link (scaled by 1000 for 0.0-1.0 range)

schemaRevision.description: Schema revision this record was created with. Absent means revision 1.
